title: Draught Excluder Tape for Door Window, Self-Adhesive Weather Stripping, 6M Type D Sealing Foam Tape Strip Against Cold Draught/Anti-Collision/Soundproof/Waterproof/Dustproof White
features: 【High-quality foam insulation sealing tape】The D type insulation self-adhesive window seal for doors to fill gaps 3-5 mm in size. Door sealing tape is made of high density EPDM foam, with smooth interior and exterior surface, high elasticity, high resilience and super durability. It does not deform easily during use and has a longer service life.

【Wide application】The foam sealing strips can be securely attached to a variety of surfaces, including wood, glass, plastic, aluminium and car/motor doors. They prevent cold, heat, dust, draughts, noise, odours and water from entering or escaping.

【Insulation and sound insulation】This self-adhesive foam seal can be used as garage door seal, door insulation, window insulation, door sound insulation, window sound insulation, door gap filler, AC window seal and front door seal.

【Professionalism and responsibility】Bynsaer window seal and door seal are made of porous, non-toxic, environmentally friendly foam, which promotes sound insulation and elasticity. Ideal for DIY projects and large jobs or repairs.

【Easy to install】Each roll can be divided into two halves before use, cut the foam door seal strip to the right size. Clean the surface of the door or window where it should be installed and wipe dry. Peel off the protective film. Install. We offer 6 m length, 6 m / roll (2 seals x 3 m/seal) x 1 roll, which is long enough to be attached to all your doors and windows.
description: Product Description Use the D-profile foam sealing tape for old and new doors and windows that need to function in all weather conditions and acoustic conditions. Efficiently fill 3-5 mm gaps between doors and windows and their frames. Insulate the interior of your home or business for greater comfort, peace and serenity. Save energy, electricity and heating/cooling costs. HIGH QUALITY Insulated and soundproof Heat/cold resistant High dhesion on the wood, glass, plastic, aluminum, car/engine doors Strong adhesive backing Highly elasticity Waterproof and non-fading BLOCK HEAT, COLD, NOISE AND MORE Don't you just love blocking out the world and enjoying some well-deserved rest in complete comfort? Use our foam sealing tape to stop cold, heat, dust, draughts, noise, odours and water from getting in and out. It effectively adheres to a variety of surfaces such as wood, glass, plastic, aluminium and car/engine doors without damaging them. A must have (sound and moisture barrier) for homes and offices. Block the cold and hot air cross, save energy and reduce electricity costs. Give you a quiet and comfortable living environment. Multifunctional door weather stripping can be used to protect against wind, dust, noise, water and insects. See More
